name: Boundary-Seeking GAN-Augmented TabTransformer for Adversarially Robust Intrusion Detection

description: arXiv:2607.16348v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Machine learning-based intrusion detection systems (IDSs) often suffer from class imbalance and vulnerability to adversarial attacks, leading to degraded detection performance and reduced robustness. This study proposes a TabTransformer framework augmented by the Boundary-Seeking Generative Adversarial Network (BGAN) for flow-based intrusion det...
author: Raihan Sultan Pasha Basuki, Aliyah Kurniasih
